headlines.title: U.S. and Iran trade strikes amid talks to end war
headlines.description: The U.S. military said it carried out what it called self-defense strikes on Iranian radar and drone control sites over the weekend, while Iran said it targeted an air base used in the U.S. attack as the two countries continued to trade strikes amid talks to end their war

headlines.title: Massive leadership vacuum weakens U.S. diplomacy in the face of global crises
headlines.description: Hundreds of diplomats have been forced to retire or were laid off in the Trump administration

headlines.title: How high-end credit card perks are hurting shoppers who pay in cash
headlines.description: A Harvard study estimates that people who pay with cash and debit cards are subsidizing $30 billion a year in points and perks for credit card users.

headlines.title: Chuck Schumer lays out plan to fight Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund in the Senate
headlines.description: The Senate minority leader said Democrats would use Senate procedure to try to kill President Donald Trump’s $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund, forcing Republicans to vote to preserve the compensation money.

headlines.title: Body of ‘Alaskan Bush People’ star Matt Brown found in Washington state river
headlines.description: A body pulled from a Washington state river has been identified as that of “Alaskan Bush People” cast member Matt Brown

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Primary challengers threaten to unseat House members across the country
headlines.description: Four House members have already lost re-election bids so far this year, just a few months into primary season.

headlines.description: The Senate minority leader said Democrats would use Senate procedure to try to kill President Donald Trump’s $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund, forcing Republicans to vote to preserve the compensation money.

headlines.title: French Navy seizes Russia-linked oil tanker in high seas, Macron says
headlines.description: The French Navy on Sunday boarded an oil tanker, named the Tagor, which was subject to international sanctions and sailing from Russia, French President Emmanuel Macron wrote on X.
